violations.description: API ATDD file is 350 lines, exceeding TEA <300-line maintainability guardrail.
violations.suggestion: Split by acceptance-criterion clusters (contract matrix, override flow, lifecycle reopen, envelope feedback).

violations.description: Single describe block carries multiple distinct concerns, increasing cognitive load and change blast radius.
violations.suggestion: Create AC-scoped describe blocks/files with shared helpers for request/response assertions.
violations.code_snippet: test.describe('Story ux-r4 Outbound Policy Guardrail UI (ATDD API)', ... )

violations.description: Priority tags exist but stable traceable case IDs are missing in test titles.
violations.suggestion: Prefix titles with immutable IDs (e.g., UXR4-API-001).

violations.description: Context creation + login setup repeats across tests and can be extracted to fixture layers.
violations.suggestion: Use authenticated fixture/storageState and story context fixture composition.

violations.description: Action-label helper is local to file and may diverge from similar suites over time.
violations.suggestion: Move common assertion helpers into shared test utility module.

violations.description: Several inline payload literals and message strings reduce reuse and can drift from fixture defaults.
violations.code_snippet: data: { orgUnitId: ..., channel: 'sms', body: 'Deterministic policy-safe outbound follow-up.' }

recommendations: Split ux-r4 API suite into smaller AC-focused files
Add stable test IDs for durable traceability
Extract repeated login/context setup into reusable fixtures
summary: Readability and modularity are the primary quality debt areas; behavior correctness remains strong.
